name: Spicy Tuna
steps: Blend all the ingredients together using a hand blender.
Mix the salt and the water.
Bring the water to a boil.
The next day pass the spelt and dry on a cloth.
Trim, cut into pieces and vacuum.
Mix 20g of the tuna with 15g of the spelt and the marinade.
Season with salt spoon into the nasturtium leaf.
